determinant_checks.comment: Directly estimated for carbon-tax support; positive and statistically significant.

Directly associated with carbon-tax opposition; negative and significant.

final_recommendation_summary: The extraction is tax-specific and retains the carbon-tax determinants. No missing carbon-tax determinants were identified; demographic and regional variables are acceptable as controls/context.
